 create table public.roles (
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 name varchar(50) not null,
 primary key (id),
 constraint uk_roles_name unique (name)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table public.roles ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_roles_name unique (name) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.6886959-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table public.tenants (
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 deleted_at timestamp(6),
 updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 schema_name varchar(50) not null,
 name varchar(100) not null,
 primary key (id),
 constraint uk_tenants_schema_name unique (schema_name)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table public.tenants ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, schema_name varchar(50) not null, name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_tenants_schema_name unique (schema_name) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.6908002-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create index idx_tenants_schema_name 
 on public.tenants (schema_name)","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create index idx_tenants_schema_name on public.tenants (schema_name) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.6923738-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table audit_logs (
 created_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
 id uuid not null,
 action varchar(255),
 actor_email varchar(255),
 details TEXT,
 entity_id varchar(255),
 entity_type varchar(255),
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table audit_logs ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, action varchar(255), actor_email varchar(255), details TEXT, entity_id varchar(255), entity_type varchar(255), primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.69465-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table email_events (
 attempt_count integer not null,
 max_attempts integer not null,
 next_retry_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
 occurred_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone,
 updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 id uuid not null,
 email varchar(255) not null,
 event_type varchar(255) not null,
 html_content TEXT,
 reason varchar(255),
 status varchar(255) not null,
 subject varchar(255),
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table email_events ( attempt_count integer not null, max_attempts integer not null, next_retry_at timestamp(6) with time zone, occurred_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, email varchar(255) not null, event_type varchar(255) not null, html_content TEXT, reason varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, subject varchar(255), primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.697264-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table lead_status_history (
 changed_at timestamp(6) not null,
 changed_by uuid,
 id uuid not null,
 lead_id uuid not null,
 status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')),
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table lead_status_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) not null, changed_by uuid, id uuid not null, lead_id uuid not null, status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')), primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.6993642-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table leads (
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 deleted_at timestamp(6),
 updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 user_id uuid not null,
 phone varchar(20),
 status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')),
 email varchar(150) not null,
 name varchar(150) not null,
 primary key (id),
 constraint uk_leads_email_user unique (email, user_id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table leads ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, phone varchar(20), status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')), email varchar(150) not null, name varchar(150) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_leads_email_user unique (email, user_id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7025455-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table login_audit (
 success boolean not null,
 suspicious boolean not null,
 created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 id uuid not null,
 tenant_id uuid not null,
 user_id uuid,
 ip_address varchar(45),
 email varchar(320) not null,
 user_agent varchar(512),
 failure_reason varchar(255),
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table login_audit ( success boolean not null, suspicious boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, user_id uuid, ip_address varchar(45), email varchar(320) not null, user_agent varchar(512), failure_reason varchar(255), primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7045668-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table logs (
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 user_id uuid,
 action TEXT not null,
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table logs ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid, action TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7076221-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table payment_checkout_requests (
 created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 id uuid not null,
 email varchar(255) not null,
 nome_empresa varchar(255),
 nome_vendedor varchar(255) not null,
 provider varchar(255) not null,
 reference_id varchar(255) not null,
 slug varchar(255) not null,
 status varchar(255) not null,
 whatsapp_vendedor varchar(255) not null,
 primary key (id),
 constraint uq_payment_checkout_reference unique (reference_id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table payment_checkout_requests ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, email varchar(255) not null, nome_empresa varchar(255), nome_vendedor varchar(255) not null, provider varchar(255) not null, reference_id varchar(255) not null, slug varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, whatsapp_vendedor varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_payment_checkout_reference unique (reference_id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7113353-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table payment_events (
 processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 id uuid not null,
 provider varchar(255) not null,
 provider_event_id varchar(255) not null,
 primary key (id),
 constraint uq_payment_event_provider_id unique (provider_event_id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table payment_events ( processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, provider varchar(255) not null, provider_event_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_payment_event_provider_id unique (provider_event_id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7138959-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table payments (
 created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 id uuid not null,
 email varchar(255) not null,
 event_id varchar(255) not null unique,
 gateway varchar(255) not null,
 payload TEXT,
 status varchar(255) not null,
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table payments ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, email varchar(255) not null, event_id varchar(255) not null unique, gateway varchar(255) not null, payload TEXT, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.716044-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table refresh_tokens (
 revoked boolean not null,
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 expires_at timestamp(6) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 user_id uuid not null,
 device_fingerprint varchar(255) not null,
 token_hash varchar(255) not null,
 primary key (id),
 constraint uq_refresh_token_hash unique (token_hash)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table refresh_tokens ( revoked boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, device_fingerprint varchar(255) not null, token_hash varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_refresh_token_hash unique (token_hash) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7181488-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table security_audit_logs (
 success boolean not null,
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 action varchar(50) not null check (action in ('LOGIN_SUCCESS','LOGIN_FAILED','ACCOUNT_LOCKED','PASSWORD_RESET_REQUESTED','PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS','USER_REGISTERED')),
 correlation_id varchar(100),
 ip_address varchar(100),
 tenant varchar(100) not null,
 email varchar(150) not null,
 user_agent varchar(255),
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table security_audit_logs ( success boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, action varchar(50) not null check (action in ('LOGIN_SUCCESS','LOGIN_FAILED','ACCOUNT_LOCKED','PASSWORD_RESET_REQUESTED','PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS','USER_REGISTERED')), correlation_id varchar(100), ip_address varchar(100), tenant varchar(100) not null, email varchar(150) not null, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7234664-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table settings (
 created_at timestamp(6) not null,
 deleted_at timestamp(6),
 updated_at timestamp(6) not null,
 whatsapp varchar(15) not null,
 id uuid not null,
 user_id uuid not null,
 company_name varchar(100),
 vendor_name varchar(100) not null,
 logo TEXT,
 welcome_message TEXT,
 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table settings ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, whatsapp varchar(15) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, company_name varchar(100), vendor_name varchar(100) not null, logo TEXT, welcome_message TEXT, primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.7258645-03:00","@version":"1","message":"
 create table subscription_history (
 changed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null,
 id uuid not null,
 vendor_id uuid not null,
 external_event_id varchar(255),
 new_status varchar(255) not null check (new_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')),
 previous_status varchar(255) not null check (previous_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')),

 primary key (id)
 )","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"main","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000} Hibernate: create table subscription_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, vendor_id uuid not null, external_event_id varchar(255), new_status varchar(255) not null check (new_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')), previous_status varchar(255) not null check (previous_status in ('TRIAL','ATIVA','INADIMPLENTE','SUSPENSA','CANCELADA','EXPIRADA')), reason varchar(255), primary key (id) ) {"@timestamp":"2026-03-06T14:24:35.728995-03:00","@version":"1","message":"

 r1_0.id,
 r1_0.created_at,

 from

testcase.name: shouldExcludeSoftDeletedLeads
shouldSaveAndRetrieveLead
shouldNotAllowDuplicateEmailPerUser
shouldCountByStatusAndDeletedAtIsNull
